cases.name: missing-ors-strategy
cases.summary: No ORS verifier strategy is parsed or executed.

cases.name: malformed-evidence-accepted
cases.summary: Malformed ORS reward evidence is accepted instead of becoming a verifier error.

cases.name: terminal-reward-without-events
cases.summary: A terminal reward is produced, but event preservation and declared-input checks are incomplete.

cases.name: gold-ors-episode
cases.summary: Declared ORS evidence, reward events, reward.json, and reward-details.json are all preserved.
